app.name: The Sanctuary
app.tagline: Your daily sanctuary for mind and body

welcome.intro: A quiet place to reconnect with your body, breath and rhythm.

step1.title: Choose your
step1.subtitle: Choose your preferred language for The Sanctuary.
step1.strugglesNoteTail: . These will shape your practice from day one.

step2.title: Your sanctuary
step2.subtitle: Free forever. No credit card needed.
step2.privacy: Your data is encrypted and never shared with third parties. You can delete your account and all data at any time.
step2.validationError: Please fill in all fields. Password must be at least 8 characters.

home.checkinPrompt: How are you feeling right now?
home.weeklyCheckinBody: Take 2 minutes to see how your doshas are trending this week.

privacy.aggregateBody: Share anonymous usage so we can see which features truly help.
privacy.aggregateOff: Off — we only use your data to personalize your own experience.
collectedList: Which screens you visit and what you tap
Whether a practice was started, skipped, or completed
App version, device type, and language
neverCollectList: Your name, email, or any contact information
The text of your notes or search queries when sharing is on
privacy.changeAnytime: You can switch this off at any time.

yourData.exportBody: A JSON file with everything we have for you.
yourData.deleteBody: Permanent. All your data is removed.
yourData.deleteConfirmBody: This removes your profile, practice history, check-ins, and all other data from our servers. It cannot be undone.
yourData.deleteDone: Your data is gone. Safe travels.
yourData.deletePartial: Most of your data was removed, but some entries couldn't be deleted. Please contact support.

card.title: A quiet ask.
card.body: Share anonymous usage so we can see what actually helps you — and drop what doesn't.
card.promise: No name. No email. No location. Just event shapes.
